name: Virat Kohli
bio: Met at BUET during freshman year. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. He moved to Dhaka for work last year.

name: Babar Azam
bio: My senior at the office who helped me land my first freelance client. We catch up over tea every couple of weeks.

name: Shakib Al Hasan
bio: Fellow web developer I met at a hackathon in Chittagong. We share resources and review each other's GitHub projects.

name: Jos Buttler
bio: Grew up in the same neighborhood in Barisal. We've known each other since we were kids. She's now studying medicine in Rajshahi.

name: Rashid Khan
bio: Best friend from school. We still play online games every weekend and talk almost daily on Discord.

name: David Warner
bio: UI designer I collaborated with on a startup project last year. Her feedback completely changed how I think about user experience.

name: Jasprit Bumrah
bio: We backpacked through Sylhet and Cox's Bazar together during semester break. Planning our next trip to Bandarban.

name: Ben Stokes
bio: We met at an online Bangla book club in 2023. She recommends the best novels and we discuss them over long voice calls.
